data.name: 叛逆二重奏
data.detailed_description:
作爲一個有着不堪回首的過去的辦公室職員，主角(可選男性或女性)幾乎被解僱，並因壓力而崩潰。他醒來時發現自己身處一個陌生的環境，一個美麗的年輕女子站在他們面前。據說她是個魅魔而你被召喚到這個世界成爲她的保鏢。

你會在這個陌生而危險的世界擁抱新的生活，還是尋求回到地球上過熟悉但困難的生活？

與你的魅魔同伴結合，邂逅新的敵人和盟友，並逐漸進化成一個強大的魔劍士。

特性:

  • 訓練系統： 提升和升級你的魅魔同伴的性技數據，這將反過來解鎖新的姿勢和玩法。

  • 遊戲內詞彙表： 隨着劇情進展，關於這個神祕世界的新術語和新概念將被解開，供你在空閒時閱讀。

  • 統計數據： 你和你的魅魔同伴的統計數據，睡過的人數，經過的時間，更多的數據將會不斷解鎖和更新。

  • 三位女主： 追你最喜歡的女孩，或者和三位女主及多個配角一起開啓後宮。

  • 有意義的選擇： 你的選擇將會影響故事的後續發展，你的選擇可能使你受傷甚至喪命。


色情內容:

  • 性交和肛交，女同，暴露癖，性玩具，足交，以及更多！

  • 可選的 性癖例如賣淫和BDSM等。

  • 除了魅魔女主角，你也可以和其他角色戀愛和發生性關係！

data.short_description: 《叛逆二重奏》是一部以故事爲導向的成人視覺小說，在這個故事中，你將被召喚並成爲一個年輕漂亮的魅魔的伴侶。進化成爲強大的魔劍士，性訓練你的魅魔同伴，邂逅美麗的精靈美女。你願意用多少人性來交換強大的力量？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:

  • 處理器: Dual Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)

  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

data.name: Rebel Duet
data.detailed_description:
An office worker with a traumatic past collapses from stress and awakens before a beautiful young woman— a succubus who has summoned you to become her partner.

Will you embrace a new life in this foreign, dangerous world, or search for a return to the one you left behind?

Bond with your succubus companion, encounter new foes and allies, and gradually evolve into a powerful sorcerer in a slow-burn fantasy story shaped by your choices.

Features:

  • Male or Female protagonist to choose between. Both playthroughs offer completely different sex scenes. 

  • Training system. Raise and level up your succubus companion's sexual stats, which will in turn unlock new sex positions and sex acts.

  • Three main heroines. Pursue your favorite girl, or start a harem with all three and numerous side heroines.

  • Dark fantasy world. Your actions have consequences, and it is possible to be injured or even killed.

  • Statistics for both you and your succubus companion. The number of people slept with, days passed, and much more will be continually updated & available to view.

Sexual Content:

  • Vaginal & Anal Sex, Lesbian Sex, Creampies, Exhibitionism, Threesomes, Sex Toys, and much more!

  • Optional kinks include BDSM, prostitution, and consensual non-monogamy / sharing.

  • In addition to the main succubus heroine, you can also have sex with other characters!

data.short_description: Rebel Duet is a story-focused adult visual novel where you are summoned as the partner of a beautiful young succubus. Evolve into a powerful sorcerer, sexually train your demonic companion, and romance elven beauties. How much of your humanity are you willing to trade for power?

Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or 11
  • Processor: Dual Core Processor (i3 or equivalent)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
